modelIdentification.name: SISO-STD-001.1-2025 - Real-time Platform Reference Information Operations FOM Module
modelIdentification.purpose: The RPR FOM supports interoperability for real-time, platform oriented defense simulation.

reference.identification: SISO-STD-001.1-2025 - Real-time Platform Reference Foundation FOM Module
SISO-STD-001.1-2025 - Real-time Platform Reference Enumerations FOM Module
SISO-STD-001.1-2025 - Real-time Platform Reference Base FOM Module
Standard for Guidance, Rationale, and Interoperability Modalities for the Real-time Platform Reference Federation Object Model (RPR FOM) SISO-STD-001-2025 4 November 2025
IEEE Standard for Distributed Interactive Simulation - Application Protocols IEEE Std 1278.1-2012 19 December 2012

modelIdentification.other:

SISO Inc. Board of Directors 7901 4th St N, Suite 300-4043 St Petersburg FL 33702 USA

interactionClass.name: IOinteraction
interactionClass.semantics: Base class for interactions associated with information operations.

parameter.name: OriginatingFederate
parameter.semantics: This field shall identify the simulation that is issuing the interaction.

parameter.name: SimulationSource
parameter.semantics: This field shall identify the name of the simulation model issuing this interaction.

parameter.name: AttackerObject
parameter.semantics: This field shall identify the IO attacker object.

parameter.name: PrimaryTargetObject
parameter.semantics: This field shall identify the IO primary target object.

parameter.name: CommunicationsNodes
parameter.semantics: Information about the IO communications nodes.

interactionClass.name: IOaction
interactionClass.semantics: Actions initiated by an IO simulation to support interactions with other IO simulations shall be communicated using the IO Action interaction.

parameter.name: ReceivingFederate
parameter.semantics: This field shall identify the simulation to which this interaction is addressed, if applicable.

parameter.name: RequestIdentifier
parameter.semantics: This field shall identify the request number for this IO Action.

parameter.name: WarfareType
parameter.semantics: This field shall identify the type of IO warfare.

parameter.name: ActionType
parameter.semantics: This field shall identify the type of IO action.

parameter.name: ActionPhase
parameter.semantics: This field shall identify the phase of the IO action.

interactionClass.name: IOreport
interactionClass.semantics: The information operations status of an entity shall be conveyed using the IO Report interaction.

parameter.name: ReportType
parameter.semantics: This field shall identify the type of IO report.

simpleData.name: TimeSecondUnsignedInteger16
simpleData.semantics: Time, based on SI base unit second, unit symbol s.

arrayData.name: IOCommunicationsNodeStructArray
arrayData.semantics: Array with information about the IO communications nodes.

arrayData.name: IOEffectStructArray
arrayData.semantics: Array with information about the IO effects.

fixedRecordData.name: CommunicationsNodeIDStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Specification of a Communications Node ID record. See IEEE Std 1278.1-2012 Section 6.2.48.4 for more information.

field.name: ObjectID
field.semantics: This field shall identify the object containing the communications node.

field.name: ElementID
field.semantics: This field shall identify a particular communications element (e.g., radio, network component, or modem) within a given entity. If this element is a radio for which a RadioTransmitter object is being published, this value shall correspond to the RadioIndex of that object.

fixedRecordData.name: IOCommunicationsNodeStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Specification of an IO Communications Node record. See IEEE Std 1278.1-2012 Section 6.2.48.2 for more information.

field.name: CommunicationsNodeType
field.semantics: This field shall indicate the present type of communications node (sender, receiver, etc.).

field.name: CommunicationsNodeID
field.semantics: This field shall indicate the communications node identifier for the entity that is part of a simulated communications network.

fixedRecordData.name: IOEffectStruct
fixedRecordData.semantics: Specification of an IO Effect record. See IEEE Std 1278.1-2012 Section 6.2.48.3 for more information.

field.name: Status
field.semantics: This field shall indicate whether the IO effect has an effect on the sender, receiver, message(s), or some combination of them.

field.name: LinkType
field.semantics: This field shall identify the IO link type as a logical or physical link or node.

field.name: Effect
field.semantics: This field shall indicate the IO effect associated with this IO attack.

field.name: EffectDutyCycle
field.semantics: This field shall indicate the IO effect duty cycle represented as a percentage in the range of 0% to 100% in 1% increments.

field.name: EffectDuration
field.semantics: This field shall indicate the duration of the IO effect in seconds, from 1 s to 65 534 s. It shall be set to indicate IO_UNTIL_FURTHER_NOTICE (fixed value: 65 535) if the duration has no fixed simulation time interval. It shall be set to zero only if the Effect field is set to Terminate Effect (255).

field.name: Process
field.semantics: This field shall indicate the IO process being performed.
